mapper.select: SELECT id, category, implementation, name, url, auth_type, username, credential, active, created_at, updated_at FROM support_tool ORDER BY category, name
SELECT id, category, implementation, name, url, auth_type, username, credential, active, created_at, updated_at FROM support_tool WHERE category = #{category} AND active = true LIMIT 1
SELECT id, category, implementation, name, url, auth_type, username, credential, active, created_at, updated_at FROM support_tool WHERE category = #{category} ORDER BY name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO support_tool (category, implementation, name, url, auth_type, username, credential, active, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{category}, #{implementation}, #{name}, #{url}, #{authType}, #{username}, #{credential}, #{active}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE support_tool SET category = #{category}, implementation = #{implementation}, name = #{name}, url = #{url}, auth_type = #{authType}, username = #{username}, credential = #{credential}, active = #{active}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
